commands_run: cd tests/gui && make && if command -v xvfb-run >/dev/null 2>&1; then xvfb-run -a ./GuiTests; else timeout 120 ./GuiTests; fi

unmet_acceptance_criteria.criterion: The new tests instantiate and tear down FMainFrame, FGamePanel, and WXStrategicUI under the GUI runner without hangs.
unmet_acceptance_criteria.expected: GuiTests completes and exits without hanging.
unmet_acceptance_criteria.actual: GuiTests stalled during strategic live GUI execution and did not complete.
unmet_acceptance_criteria.error: Hung test run requiring manual termination.
